notes:
Replaced power steering coolant pump. Cleaned all sea strainers. Cleaned all bilge areas. Stanley Steemer cleaned carpets.
******IMPORTANT******
Check valve on mid bilge possible blocked, mid bilge doesnt drain.
Changed main can fuel filters on mains. Inspected hand prime pumps. Need to trace main fuel prime pumps.

Purged all air and full inspection of Hynautic steering system. Creation of diagram for system as one wasnt present.
Regained steering in tuna tower.
Both helms fully responsive.
Leaks identified in AP system, shut valves until work can be done.
Leak present in Eskimo Ice Maker throwing Low Pressure alarm, HVAC tech called and scheduled next tuesday.

Replaced ERU to gearbox cable on port side. Greased all piston ends on cables. Replaced all cable mounts in engine room. Measured length of Panish throttle cables. Sending out Panish tower control heads to be rebuilt.
Replaced engine room mid bilge check valve with proper sized swing arm check valve. Need to replace stern bilge check valve as well.
HVAC technician filled eskimo ice maker with refrigerant and is operational again.
cockpit freezer and flybridge freezer compressors and causing water to pool up underneath their bilge area. need to drill a pass through for bilge drainage.
Small drip leak observed on fresh water pump selector switch going to pump #2. Fitting must be addressed before leak worsens
Inboard AC pump has multiple pinhole leaks on the front housing. Switched to secondary pump.
